name: Egnyte
description: Egnyte is an enterprise file sharing, storage, and governance platform. This integration monitors user access, role-based controls, and encryption compliance.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Egnyte admin console
2. Go to Settings > Developer
3. Generate an API token with user management permissions
4. Enter your Egnyte subdomain (e.g., 'acme' from acme.egnyte.com) and the API token

credentialFields.label: Egnyte Domain
credentialFields.helpText: Your Egnyte subdomain (e.g., if your URL is acme.egnyte.com, enter 'acme')

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate an API token from your Egnyte admin console under Settings > Developer

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Egnyte users with their access types, roles, and activity status to verify appropriate access controls.

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies Egnyte user types (admin, power, standard) and authentication types (SSO, AD, local) to ensure proper role-based access control.

checks.name: Encryption at Rest
checks.description: Verifies that Egnyte encrypts stored data at rest. Egnyte uses AES-256 encryption by default for all accounts.
